Identity.Name: StingCDEStates
Identity.Definition: Common Data Environment lifecycle states per ISO 19650-1 §10.2 — the four containers any information container (drawing, document, model) passes through: WIP → SHARED → PUBLISHED → ARCHIVED. Drives STING's document register CDE state machine and the Planscape CDE permissions model.

Governance.StandardsBasis: ISO 19650-1:2018 §10.2 CDE workflow; STING DocumentRecord state machine

Value.Definition: Work In Progress — visible only to the originator team. Pre-coordination, pre-sharing. Default state for new containers.
Shared — issued for use by other appointed parties / disciplines. Non-contractual; informational status varies (S1/S2/S3/S4).
Published — authorised and contractual. Carries A1..A5 suitability codes. Construction, tender, manufacture, handover use.
Archived — superseded but retained for audit / regulatory record. Read-only. Never deleted.
